definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="-28" y="37"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="block_nbt_text_set"><value name="tagName"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">placedby</field></block></value><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value><value name="tagValue"><block type="entity_name"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><next><block type="block_nbt_logic_set" inline="false"><value name="tagName"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">noEat</field></block></value><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value><value name="tagValue"><block type="logic_binary_ops" inline="false"><field name="OP">OR</field><value name="A"><block type="math_binary_ops"><field name="OP">EQ</field><comment pinned="false" h="77" w="416">due to wierd bug where the fox block at 255 y will not eat you but will show the eat announcement, it needs to refuse to eat you otherwise it can be used to spam chat.</comment><value name="A"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">255</field></block></value></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_binary_ops"><field name="OP">EQ</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">fox block cannot eat if it is already in a belly. vore-ception is not currently possible</comment><value name="A"><block type="entity_dimension_id"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><value name="B"><block type="get_dimensionid"><field name="dimension">CUSTOM:Belly</field></block></value></block></value></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
